testimonials.name: Grace Wanjiku
testimonials.review: Best bridal makeup I have ever had. My photos were absolutely stunning and I felt like royalty. Every guest complimented my look.

testimonials.name: Fatuma Hassan
testimonials.review: The academy course completely transformed my passion into a full career. I now run my own studio and I owe it all to Phoina.

testimonials.name: Amara Osei
testimonials.review: I have been coming here for over a year. The team always makes me feel so special. My hair and nails have never looked better.

testimonials.name: Joyce Kimani
testimonials.review: Fatuma is an absolute wizard with skincare. My hyperpigmentation has improved so much. I finally feel confident without makeup.

testimonials.name: Blessing Nwosu
testimonials.review: Ordered the foundation online and I am obsessed. Finally a brand that truly caters to our skin tones. Will order again and again.

testimonials.name: Naomi Achieng
testimonials.review: Phoina Beauty styled my entire bridal party. Every single person looked flawless. Truly the best luxury experience in Nairobi.
